name: Silexion Therapeutics Corp
business: Silexion Therapeutics Corp is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing proprietary small interfering RNA (siRNA) therapeutics targeting KRAS-driven cancers. Its lead product candidate, SIL204, is a second-generation siRNA designed to suppress mutated KRAS proteins, initially focusing on locally advanced pancreatic cancer (LAPC) patients with KRAS G12D/V mutations.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage, oncology-focused biotechnology company engaged in the discovery and development of proprietary treatments for cancers driven by mutations in the mutations in the Kirsten rat sarcoma viral oncogene homolog ( KRAS ).

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2/3 clinical trial for SIL204
catalysts.sentence: We are expecting to initiate the first part of our Phase 2/3 clinical studies in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Submit application to BfArM for clinical studies in Germany
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2026, we will submit to BfArM an application to conduct clinical studies in Germany.

catalysts.event: Submit investigational new drug application (IND) to FDA
catalysts.sentence: We expect to submit an investigational new drug application (IND) to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) in Q1, 2027.

catalysts.event: Apply for Orphan Drug Designation in US and EU
catalysts.sentence: We expect to apply H1 2027 for Orphan Drug Designation in both the U.S. and EU.

tamClaims.claim: USA: 66,440 estimated new cases of pancreatic cancer in 2024
tamClaims.sentence: Region Estimated New Cases (2024) USA 66,440 EU 132,600 Rest of the world 311,960

tamClaims.claim: LAPC represents about 30% of pancreatic cancers
tamClaims.sentence: LAPC constitute approximately 30% of pancreatic cancers

tamClaims.claim: KRAS G12D and KRAS G12V mutations represent about 68% of pancreatic cancer
tamClaims.sentence: the KRAS G12D and KRAS G12V mutations (KRAS G12D/V) represent about 68% of PC.

tamClaims.claim: First indication targeting LAPC patients bearing KRAS G12D/V which represents about 20% of all PC patients
tamClaims.sentence: Our first indication is focusing on LAPC patients bearing KRAS G12D/V which represents about 20% of all PC patients.
